title: Forecasting Bitcoin Prices and Analyzing Geopolitical Risks: A Residual Analysis Approach using LSTM
description: Reproducible research pipeline combining a univariate LSTM forecast of daily BTC/USD closing prices (Bitstamp exchange, 2012-2014 training) with a two-sigma residual-analysis procedure that flags candidate dates in 2015 for downstream qualitative investigation of geopolitically significant events. Phase 2 merges the flagged outliers with a curated qualitative database of macro / institutional events and computes the Explaining Ratio (ER).
